# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for istio sidecar injection disabled and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: frontend-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: frontend-service
    version: v1
    team: platform
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: frontend-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "100m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "128Mi"
        proxy.istio.io/config: |
          holdApplicationUntilProxyStarts: true
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeOutboundPorts: ""
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeInboundPorts: ""
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: frontend-service-sa
      containers:
        - name: frontend
          image: registry.example.com/frontend-service:1.2.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "250m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
          securityContext:
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: 1000
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: backend-api-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: backend-api-service
    version: v1
    team: platform
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-api-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: backend-api-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "150m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "256Mi"
        proxy.istio.io/config: |
          holdApplicationUntilProxyStarts: true
          tracing:
            sampling: 100.0
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeOutboundPorts: ""
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeInboundPorts: ""
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: backend-api-service-sa
      containers:
        - name: backend-api
          image: registry.example.com/backend-api-service:2.0.1
          ports:
            - containerPort: 9090
              name: grpc
              protocol: TCP
            - containerPort: 8081
              name: http-metrics
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_PORT
              value: "9090"
            - name: METRICS_PORT
              value: "8081"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "1Gi"
          livenessProbe:
            grpc:
              port: 9090
            initialDelaySeconds: 20
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            grpc:
              port: 9090
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 5
          securityContext:
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: 1000
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: order-processing-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: order-processing-service
    version: v1
    team: platform
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-processing-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: order-processing-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "200m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "256Mi"
        proxy.istio.io/config: |
          holdApplicationUntilProxyStarts: true
          terminationDrainDuration: 30s
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeOutboundPorts: ""
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeInboundPorts: ""
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: order-processing-service-sa
      containers:
        - name: order-processor
          image: registry.example.com/order-processing-service:1.5.3
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "1Gi"
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 20
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 5
          securityContext:
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: 1000
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: production
  labels:
    istio-injection: enabled
    name: production
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: default-strict-mtls
  namespace: production
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: frontend-to-backend-policy
  namespace: production
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-api-service
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/production/sa/frontend-service-sa"
      to:
        - operation:
            ports:
              - "9090"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: backend-to-order-policy
  namespace: production
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-processing-service
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/production/sa/backend-api-service-sa"
      to:
        - operation:
            ports:
              - "8080"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-all-default
  namespace: production
spec:
  {}
